prompt: A candid documentary-style indoor family snapshot in a modest early-2000s living room in China, photographed like a real consumer camera photo with soft ambient daylight, slight grain, natural color, and a yellow date stamp in the bottom right reading {argument name="date stamp" default="2003.02.02"}. The scene shows exactly 3 people: a little girl in the foreground sitting cross-legged on a patterned carpet and playing with a colorful toy car, one adult kneeling on the floor near the TV stand in a light gray sweater and blue pants, and one adult leaning over electronics equipment in a dark blue long-sleeve shirt near a sofa. Make the image feel unposed, nostalgic, and convincingly photographic, as if captured during an ordinary afternoon at home. On the left side, include 1 bulky CRT television displaying black-and-white static snow, sitting on a dark media stand with stacked electronics and shelves below. In the center background, place a wall calendar showing {argument name="calendar year" default="2003"}, and a wooden shelving unit holding framed family photos, books, tapes, and small household items. On the right side, include 1 sofa draped in a light floral lace cover with a blue folder or notebook resting on the arm. Add domestic clutter and lived-in details: exactly 2 potted plants on the floor by the TV, a patterned rug covering most of the floor, and a slightly dim, warm, everyday apartment atmosphere. The child should wear a pink sweater and dark pants, with small tied pigtails, focused downward on the toy. The overall style should be highly realistic, like a genuine archival family photograph rather than an illustration, with believable perspective, soft shadows, and subtle lens imperfections.
translatedPrompt: 一张纪实风格的室内家庭快照，背景是中国 21 世纪初一个朴素的客厅，拍摄效果如同真实的消费级相机照片，带有柔和的自然光、轻微的噪点、自然的色彩，以及右下角黄色的日期戳，显示为 {argument name="date stamp" default="2003.02.02"}。画面中正好有 3 个人：前景中一个小女孩盘腿坐在花纹地毯上玩着一辆彩色玩具车；一名穿着浅灰色毛衣和蓝色裤子的成年人跪在电视柜旁；另一名穿着深蓝色长袖衬衫的成年人靠在沙发旁的电子设备上。让画面呈现出一种未经摆拍、怀旧且极具真实感的摄影效果，仿佛是在家中一个普通的午后抓拍的。左侧放置一台笨重的 CRT 电视机，屏幕显示着黑白雪花，电视机放在深色的媒体柜上，下方堆放着电子产品和架子。背景中央挂着一张显示 {argument name="calendar year" default="2003"} 年的挂历，以及一个木制置物架，上面摆放着带框的家庭照片、书籍、磁带和小型家居用品。右侧是一张铺着浅色碎花蕾丝罩的沙发，扶手上放着一个蓝色文件夹或笔记本。增加生活化的杂乱细节：电视机旁的地板上有 2 盆盆栽，地面大部分被花纹地毯覆盖，营造出一种光线略暗、温暖的日常公寓氛围。小女孩穿着粉色毛衣和深色裤子，扎着小辫子，低头专注于玩具。整体风格应高度写实，如同真实的家庭档案照片而非插画，具备可信的透视、柔和的阴影以及细微的镜头瑕疵。

breakdown.creativeCore: 21 世纪初家庭客厅照片：一张充满怀旧感的写实快照，展现了 21 世纪初杂乱的家庭客厅，适用于生成具有说服力的档案风格生活照。
breakdown.subject: 人物
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 怀旧照片、纪实场景、人物生活方式、品牌氛围图

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 摄影/真实场景 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, documentary]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: lens, camera]。

Text requirements:
要求精确文字。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
